description_long: This is a single-family detached house with a light-colored exterior, featuring a prominent gable roof and a covered front porch. The house sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with shrubs and small trees accenting the landscaping. The front facade includes a main entryway with steps leading up to a sheltered porch supported by columns, and several symmetrically arranged windows. The roof is primarily a gable style, with a secondary hip section over the porch area. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a back door, with the overall structure appearing to be one story tall. The house's design is reminiscent of a modern ranch or suburban American home, emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A light-colored, single-story house with a gable roof, covered front porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the extended gable roof, back door, and fewer windows, with visible lawn space.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long facade, multiple windows, and a clear view of the roof's gable structure.
description_view_3: Rear/side view showing the back entrance, additional windows, and landscaping elements along the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, steps leading to a single main door, and a small overhang.
